sourcesContent:
About Album Browser

Application Information

Developer: Your Name

Course: Web Development - Lab 6

Version: 1.0.0

Description: A single-page application built with Angular that demonstrates routing, HTTP communication, and CRUD operations using the JSONPlaceholder API.

Technologies Used

  • Angular 17+
  • Angular Router
  • HttpClient
  • RxJS Observables
  • JSONPlaceholder API
